events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess trench protection commercial project. Observed condition: no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel. Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. OSHA 1926.651(c)(2) requires safe means of egress (e.g., ladder) in trench excavations 4 ft or more in depth, located so as to require no more than 25 ft of lateral travel. If no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high (cave-in/egress). Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Confidence 1.0. Findings: no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel. Actions: install ladder or ramp within 25 ft lateral travel, inspect egress. Rationale. References: OSHA 1926.651(c)(2). Need ensure JSON valid.
